rationale: Review 2 correctly approves work that is properly abstracted (arbitrary fields, NeZero (2:K), Fin/Fintype corollaries derived from the natural ℕ induction). Review 1's findings are contested design preferences (proof chain direction, sqrtTower API shape, ∃-quantifier style) where reasonable Mathlib maintainers genuinely disagree, so acting on them does not clearly produce a better PR.
